Text: At a meeting on 25 March 2025, having lost contact with the authors, the Committee decided to discontinue its consideration of communications No. 3821/2020, No. 3848/2020, No. 3873/2021, No. 3942/2021, No. 4011/2021, No. 4017/2021, No. 4021/2021, No. 4022/2021, No. 4051/2021, No. 4075/2021, No. 4096/2022 and No. 4108/2022.
